_pairingUnconfirmed: The vizPubkey<->operator pairing below is PROVISIONAL: vizPubkeys are listed in on-chain key_auths order (gram.gate active set), which need NOT match the op-1/2/3 order baked into the TON multisig signer array. tonPubkey holds each operator's mainnet v4/v5r1 WALLET ADDRESS (the public TON identity we have), not an ed25519 hex pubkey. IMPORTANT: vizPubkey IS NOW READ ON THE RUNTIME PATH — SignerRegistry enforces that a signer's recovered VIZ key matches its labeled operator id. Confirm the true VIZ<->operator pairing with the operators and correct any mislabeling BEFORE launching signers on mainnet (a mislabeled key will be rejected at registration with 'key mismatch'). Also supply real ed25519 tonPubkeys BEFORE relying on this manifest for a TON rotation.
